title: StealthCore
description: Fast, Smooth, Unstoppable – PvP Ready | View Gallery for Information
body:
# ⚡ StealthCore
### Fast, Smooth, Unstoppable — PvP Ready

> A lightweight, client-side Fabric modpack built for competitive Minecraft. Every mod earns its place. Nothing is wasted.

---

## 🎯 Overview

**StealthCore** is a combat-focused optimization modpack for **Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.1 & 1.21.11** running on **Fabric**. It's fully client-side — drop into any server and every feature works immediately, no server-side install needed.

The goal is simple: **more FPS, sharper controls, cleaner UI, better information** — everything a serious player needs and nothing they don't.

---

## ⚔️ Combat Features

| Feature | Description |
|---|---|
| **Fast Block Placement** | Snappier, more responsive block placement for clutch builds and fights |
| **Quick Elytra Swapper** | Instantly swap elytra ↔ chestplate with a custom keybind |
| **Totem Counter** | Always-visible count of totems in your inventory |
| **Saturation Gain Icons** | Real-time HUD icons showing hunger and saturation state |
| **Optimized Settings for PvP** | Pre-tuned game settings ready from first launch |

---

## 🖥️ Interface & HUD

- **Custom HUD** — Press `O` to open the live HUD editor. Move, resize, and toggle any element
- **PreOptimized HUD** — A clean default layout ships ready to go, no setup required
- **Darked Themed UI** — Full dark aesthetic across all menus and inventory screens
- **Better F3** — Cleaner, reorganized debug screen so you find info instantly
- **Task Manager via `F12`** — In-game CPU/RAM overlay without alt-tabbing *(1.21.11 only)*

---

## 📚 Information & QoL

- **Just Enough Items (Integrated)** — In-inventory recipe lookup and item info
- **Optimized Enchanted Books** — Clearer, more readable enchantment tooltips for smarter gearing decisions

---

## 🚀 Performance

- **Lightweight by design** — No bloat, no redundant mods, no unnecessary rendering
- **Client-side only** — Works on any standard Java server out of the box
- **Chunky (included)** — Pre-generate chunks before playing for maximum smoothness
  > ⚠️ Chunky will **not** boost FPS unless configured and run. See the [Chunky mod page](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunky) for setup.

---

## 🎨 Visuals

- **Optimized PvP Texturepack** — Sharp, clean visuals with minimal performance cost, enabled by default
- **StealthPaints** *(Disabled by default)* — Optional custom paintings pack. Enable in resource pack settings when ready
  > 🔞 By enabling StealthPaints you confirm you are **16 or older**

---

## 🔓 Account Switcher

Switch Minecraft accounts **in-game without restarting**. Both premium and cracked accounts are supported.

---

## 📋 Details

| | |
|---|---|
| **Loader** | Fabric |
| **Versions** | 1.21.1 · 1.21.11 |
| **Environment** | Client-side only |
| **Tags** | Combat · Lightweight · Optimization · Multiplayer |
| **License** | [CC-BY-NC-4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/) |
| **Author** | KairoVeynn |

---

## 🛠️ Installation

1. Install [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app) or [Prism Launcher](https://prismlauncher.org/)
2. Search **StealthCore** → Install
3. Launch — settings and HUD are pre-configured
4. Press `O` to customize your HUD
5. Press `F12` to monitor system performance *(1.21.11)*
6. Optionally enable **StealthPaints** in resource pack settings

---

*StealthCore — because every millisecond counts.*
